content:
# Session 29 (iter-029) — Review

## Metadata
- Files edited: `TensorObjSubstrate.lean`, `TensorObjSubstrate/DualInverse.lean`, `TensorObjInverse.lean`.
- **BUILD STATE: RED.** `lake build TensorObjSubstrate.DualInverse` FAILS at `DualInverse.lean:219`
  (`linearEndo_apply_comm`). `TensorObjSubstrate` itself builds green-mod-sorry (2 sorries).
  `TensorObjInverse` cannot build (upstream DualInverse RED).
- `sync_leanok` iter=29: **+3 / −29** — the L219 break cascaded, stripping ~29 previously-green
  `\leanok` across DualInverse → TensorObjInverse → RelPicFunctor. **Net regression, not progress.**
- dag: gaps=0, frontier=5, unmatched=105.

## Headline
Three lanes ran. The math in every lane is **honest and structurally correct** (lean-auditor confirmed),
but a single one-token name-resolution bug left the whole DualInverse→TensorObjInverse chain RED, so
**none of the intended closures (B1 eval-core, hN, cocycle assembly) actually landed**, and ~29 markers
were stripped. The μ-side decomposition (TensorObjSubstrate) is the only lane that committed buildable
progress (rhs_tmul proven, comparison assembly proven mod lhs_tmul).

## The build-breaking bug (must-fix, root cause pinpointed by lean-auditor)
`DualInverse.lean:219`: `rw [← smul_eq_mul, ← map_smul, smul_eq_mul, mul_one]`. The unqualified
`← map_smul` resolves to the **project-local `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.map_smul`**, NOT
`LinearMap.map_smul`, in the full-import context → "did not find an occurrence of the pattern".
- Why it slipped through: the prover's isolated `lake env lean ScratchDualTest.lean` (imports only
  PresheafInternalHom → `Scheme.Modules.map_smul` not in scope) PASSED, and `lean_diagnostic_messages`
  reported the file clean. Only the full `lake build` surfaces the shadowing.
- **Fix: `← LinearMap.map_smul` (one token).** lean-auditor confirms everything else is honest; this
  single fix greens DualInverse and lands `presheafDualUnitIso_naturality`, `dualUnitIso_dualIsoOfIso`
  (hN), and `tensorObj_unit_self_duality_collapse` transitively.
- **LESSON (knowledge base):** isolated-scratch-pass + LSP-clean ≠ full-build-green when a proof uses an
  UNQUALIFIED lemma name that a project-local decl can shadow under the full import set. Verify the
  closing proof with a real `lake build` of the owning module, not just `lake env lean` on a thin scratch.

## Per-target

### `presheafDualUnitIso_naturality` (DualInverse, B1 eval-core ★') — PARTIAL (blocked by L219)
Body filled, structurally honest: `Iso.ext → hom_ext;intro X → ModuleCat.hom_ext;ext φ →
simp[Iso.trans_hom,comp_app,…] → 2 defeq `change`s to eval-at-1 form → exact linearEndo_apply_comm _ _`.
Tainted with `sorryAx` only because `linearEndo_apply_comm` is RED. Lands when L219 fixed.

### `dualUnitIso_dualIsoOfIso` hN (TensorObjInverse) — PARTIAL (blocked transitively)
Sorry REMOVED. Closing recipe (verified `goals: []` in LSP): `apply Iso.ext; unfold dualIsoOfIso
dual_unit_iso; simp only [Iso.trans_hom,Functor.mapIso_hom,Category.assoc]; have hcore := congrArg
Iso.hom (presheafDualUnitIso_naturality …); simp only [Iso.trans_hom] at hcore; rw [← Category.assoc];
erw [← Functor.map_comp, hcore, Functor.map_comp, Category.assoc]; erw [counit.naturality s.hom]; simp`.
`erw` (not `rw`) required past the defeq-not-syntactic `sheafification.map` legs. Module can't build
(upstream RED). Lands when L219 fixed.

### `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_rhs_tmul` (TensorObjSubstrate) — SOLVED
New, sorry-free, axiom-clean. `set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in … :=
restrictScalars_μ_app_tmul φ'`. ABSTRACT-object signature mandatory (concrete `functor.obj X .obj W`
binders fail module-synth — the binder trap). Composition-μ reduces to restrictScalars-μ by defeq
(`pushforward_μ_eq` is `rfl`).

### `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison` (TensorObjSubstrate) — SOLVED (mod lhs_tmul)
Assembly proven: `hom_ext` to per-section, defer each `W` to `lhs_tmul`. No own sorry; transitively
gated by lhs_tmul. The asymmetric mate-vs-composition seam is now fully reduced.

### `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul` (TensorObjSubstrate) — PARTIAL (genuine residual, sorry@L4353)
Packaged as the per-section comparison `μ(rightAdjointLaxMonoidal hadj').app W =
μ(presheafPushforwardLaxMonoidal φ').app W`, `tensor_ext` inside; RHS = `m⊗ₜn` by rhs_tmul; the open
residual is the LHS mate (adjoint-transported) pure-tensor value (`rightAdjointLaxMonoidal_μ` +
`homEquiv_unit` → `unit ≫ map(δ ≫ counit⊗counit)`). NOT a 1-1 port of `pushforwardComp_lax_μ`.

### `pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse` (TensorObjSubstrate, sorry@L4506) — BLOCKED/gated
Not attempted. IsMonoidal/mate route CIRCULAR (do not retry). Consume `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison`
once lhs_tmul lands.

### `exists_tensorObj_inverse` (TensorObjInverse, sorry@L211) — NOT ATTEMPTED
Frontier; foundation (hN/B1) written but blocked by L219. A precise iso-algebra bridge comment was added
at L211 for the eventual assembly.

## Reviewer audits dispatched
- **lean-auditor (iter029)** [`task_results/lean-auditor-iter029.md`]: 1 must-fix (the L219
  name-resolution build break — root cause pinpointed), 2 major (premature "closed" claims in
  comments/memory while RED), 2 minor style, 0 excuse-comments. All claimed closures honest *modulo*
  the one bug.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker (substrate029)** [`task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-substrate029.md`]:
  0 must-fix, 1 major (blueprint frames `lhs_tmul` as a one-sided VALUE but the Lean is a per-section
  morphism COMPARISON — statement-shape drift; blueprint-writer fix), 1 minor (rhs_tmul abstraction
  undocumented). Signatures otherwise faithful; rhs_tmul genuinely proven.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. `sync_leanok` correctly stripped markers on the RED declarations; I did NOT override (the
  closures genuinely do not build). No `\mathlibok`/`\lean{}` renames needed. See recommendations for
  the blueprint-writer wording fix on `lem:pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul`.

## Blueprint doctor
Clean — no orphan chapters, no broken `\ref`/`\uses`, no axioms.
